creator: empty.japan
caption:
Japan has so many sides, from endless ski resorts with JaPow to tranquil hiking trails and white sand beaches (not just in Okinawa, but on the main island too) 🥰

Get access to my map where I’m constantly adding new things to do (over 330 in Kyoto, Osaka, and Nara so far). Soon I’ll add Kinosaki Onsen town, and then... my favorite area near Mt. Fuji 🗻
